title: data-tw comps-multiples pack
description: Output of `pack.py --ticker <t> --pack comps-multiples` or `pack.py --tickers <t1,t2,...> --pack comps-multiples`. yfinance multiples-only — designed for `analysis-comps`. Per-ticker envelope contains data.multiples extracted from yfinance.info: trailingPE, forwardPE, priceToSalesTrailing12Months, priceToBook, enterpriseToEbitda, enterpriseToRevenue, marketCap, enterpriseValue. No MOPS / TWSE / FinMind / macro fetches. No _partial flag (lightest pack).

tickers.description: Map keyed by yfinance-style ticker (e.g. '2330.TW' → envelope).

multiples.description: Subset extracted from yfinance.info. Any of the 8 keys may be missing if yfinance does not return that field for the ticker. All values are numbers (or null).
